reviews.review_title: It was fun while it lasted
reviews.review_description: Sadly, the game ended you can’t get out of stump Apparently people reported it. It was fun. There was a zero gravity room so people who are seeing this to see if they want the game don’t get the game it won’t let you get out of. It’s not like it used to be two stars.📈📉
So fun but level 3 and 4s video tapes don’t make any sense with the nickelodeon creepypastas.

you didn't lmao

reviews.review_title: Sorry mate i didn't mean to rude to you
Any body  go subscribe to championvr
reviews.review_description:
Best game in 2024 better then gorilla tag and no more rainbows and yeeps hind seek
 I didn’t play this game but my friend s tell me to play I love the game now I be playing for 
20/7

i was playing right and nocliped through the ice cuz i pushed myself on accident and then i went inside of the vent by accident i did this in a private cuz i was playing randomly then i saw the mod cosmetics and restarted my game so thats the glitch btw how do you get mod i would rlly like to be a mod for your game

developer_response.body: We know about the glitch and are working to get it fixed; also, to get mod, you have to join the discord and follow the steps or just get accepted when mod apps re-open, and you apply. You can find the discord invite on the message of the day in stump.

reviews.review_description: Everything is good old capuchin but this is still updating
It’s sooooooooooooo god since cosmetics work and corlors tooo and level 3 and 4

So I decided to give this game a second chance and it was actually pretty fun I even joined the discord also I got an idea for a cosmetic which is the edible golden banana it would be able to be eaten and I think it's a good idea keep up the good work!
Thx for bringing the old version back I play horror every day with my friends
